cases.description: Final realistic-hard 50-hop strict benchmark with unique servers, natural app-aware phrasing, and concrete task intents

hops.server_intent: In AgentQL (Enable AI agents to get structured data from unstructured web with AgentQL.), perform this task.
hops.tool_intent: Extracts structured data from a given URL using a prompt to describe the data and fields to extract.. Include url, prompt if needed.

hops.server_intent: In Aiven (Navigate your Aiven projects and interact with the PostgreSQL®, Apache Kafka®, ClickHouse® and OpenSearch®...), perform this task.
hops.tool_intent: List all projects on your Aiven account..

hops.tool_intent: Get the query plan for a SQL query.

hops.server_intent: In Apache IoTDB (MCP Server for Apache IoTDB database and its tools), perform this task.
hops.tool_intent: Get a list of all tables in the database.

hops.server_intent: In Apify (Actors MCP Server: Use 3,000+ pre-built cloud tools to extract data from websites, e-commerce, social media...), perform this task.
hops.tool_intent: Retrieves documentation, input schema, and details about a specific Actor..

hops.server_intent: In APIMatic MCP (APIMatic MCP Server is used to validate OpenAPI specifications using APIMatic. The server processes OpenAPI...), perform this task.
hops.tool_intent: Validates an OpenAPI file using APIMatic’s API and returns a validation summary..

hops.server_intent: In Arize Phoenix (Inspect traces, manage prompts, curate datasets, and run experiments using Arize Phoenix, an open-source AI...), perform this task.
hops.tool_intent: Provides a lightweight wrapper around OpenTelemetry primitives with Phoenix-aware defaults.

hops.tool_intent: Retrieves available baseline audiences, optionally filtered by country.. Include country if needed.

hops.tool_intent: Search AWS documentation and best practices using the official AWS search API..

hops.tool_intent: List available Axiom datasets.

hops.tool_intent: Retrieve proxy implementation contract addresses.. Include network, contract if needed.

hops.tool_intent: Search for files in Box.. Include query, file_extensions if needed.

hops.server_intent: In Chroma (Embeddings, vector search, document storage, and full-text search with the open-source AI application database), perform this task.
hops.tool_intent: List all collections with pagination support.

hops.server_intent: In CircleCI (Enable AI Agents to fix build failures from CircleCI.), perform this task.
hops.tool_intent: Retrieves test metadata for CircleCI jobs. Can be used with CircleCI URLs or local project context.. Include url_or_context if needed.

hops.server_intent: In ClickHouse (Query your ClickHouse database server.), perform this task.
hops.tool_intent: List all tables in a database.. Include database if needed.

hops.server_intent: In Codacy (Interact with Codacy API to query code quality issues, vulnerabilities, and coverage insights about your code.), perform this task.
hops.tool_intent: Lists and filters code quality issues in a repository. This is the primary tool for investigating general code quality concerns (e.g., best practices, performance, com...

hops.tool_intent: Pulls an impact assessment from the CodeLogic server's APIs for the specified code method and class.. Include method, class if needed.

hops.tool_intent: List docs with optional filtering by folder, title, text content, and more.

hops.server_intent: In DevHub (Manage and utilize website content within the DevHub CMS platform), perform this task.
hops.tool_intent: Gets all locations for a specific business. Returns detailed location information including address, coordinates, and URLs.. Include business_id if needed.

hops.tool_intent: Search for users.

hops.tool_intent: Performs a web search to find information based on the query provided..

hops.tool_intent: Retrieves detailed information about a specific job, identified by the job_id, including its status, parameters, results, and any relevant metadata..
